allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force -Name; Write-Output "---NODE---"; node --version; Write-Output "---NPM---"; npm --version; Write-Output "---NG---"; \(Get-Command ng -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "---DOCKER---"; docker --version; Write-Output "---GIT---"; git --version)
PowerShell(git add -A; git status --short | Select-Object -First 60; Write-Output "---COUNT---"; \(git status --short | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
